summary: Comprehensive testing of Slow Fashion Society thrifting website completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% pass rate). Frontend core functionality working with minor navigation and filtering issues. All major e-commerce features operational including authentication, product browsing, cart/wishlist, and admin dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: Category filter for 'Tops' returns 0 results in UI, but backend has 2 'Tops' products

integration_issues.issue: Browser session management issues during navigation after login

affected_screen: Admin, Cart, Checkout, Orders, Shop, ProductDetail, Wishlist pages

passed_tests: Admin dashboard access and product management
Homepage with hero section and categories bento grid
Product detail page with add to cart/wishlist
All public pages (About, Support, Socials, Feedback, New Arrivals)
Stripe payment integration setup (not tested end-to-end due to test mode)

medium_priority: Fix category filtering on Shop page - frontend filter not matching backend category names properly
Resolve browser session persistence issues during post-login navigation
low_priority: Add missing dependencies to React useEffect hooks to resolve linting warnings
